payload.answer: Committed cautious memories: Sam’s recent affiliation with Point72 and their request for the AI infrastructure article. Entity resolution remains ambiguous due to limited identifying information.

entity_resolution.reason: Only a first name is available; raw email address was not exposed. Cannot confidently resolve to an existing person without more context.

details: Did not expose raw private email address.
Did not quote raw source content unnecessarily.
